item.title: I Am Diego Maradona
item.description: A writer who stole his friend's work is forced to write another sad novel on his behalf while in the middle of a family fight.

item.title: Sperm Whale
item.description: It's a sequel to the first Sperm Whale. This movie is set at Arzhang (Reza Attaran) 's wedding day. It includes lots of flashbacks to the time of of friendship of him with the bride, Roya (Mahnaz…

item.title: Giti's Problem
item.description: It's about a couple Iraj and Giti who their life is about to collapse. Their problem is Giti's virtual life in the internet and the doubts and consequences of that which affect their life.

item.title: Spyder
item.description: Alzahra gives you the opportunity to watch Spyder! The movie spyder starts when A youngster at MGBS is made to run off and going to be cheated by 2 youth. Be that as it may, some way or another…

item.title: Hot Scent
item.description: Hot Scent is a tale of generational gap, a contrast evident in 20 year old Maryam's attitudes and her strict parents'. Returning home past the curfew after spending time with her boyfriend, she is…

item.title: The Lost Strait
item.description: The resistance of Ammar battalion in Abughoraib strait at the last days of war.

item.title: A Hairy Tale
item.description: The nature of this film, required stylized and fantasy CGI work. From recreation of last sequence of classic film, Casablanca, to crazy Kill Bill style shots, all which required interesting CGI.

item.description: To take part in a competition three teenagers are trying to make a drone. Some saying that people saw a cheetah in the plains around their town. The news interferes the activity of the teenagers and…

item.title: Saaho
item.description: Saaho is a 2019 Indian action thriller film written and directed by Sujeeth. It was released in India in theatres and IMAX on 30 August 2019. AlzahraVFX worked on more than 200 VFX shots on this…

item.title: Gold
item.description: Few youngsters decide to with the help of each other start a restaurant business. But meanwhile the father of one of them dies and a big sum of money is disappear too which begin their troubles.

item.title: The Second Year of My College
item.description: Mahtab and Ava are classmates in their second year of college studying engineering. The story begin when they and other classmates go on a trip to Esfahan.
